AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD PURSUANT TO C C P 1280 ET SEQ. AND 1285.4 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED.
